title: FT-P4-0001 Initialize SqlMapper runtime
description: Registered mapper startup initialization for underscore mapping, finance connection defaults, DateOnly/TimeOnly, and JSON/JSONB handlers.

title: FT-P4-0002 Route finance data session through SqlMapper
description: Moved finance raw query/execute operations behind OrmMapper helpers so services keep using the finance data contract instead of direct Dapper calls.

title: FT-P4-0003 Fix DateOnly query parameters
description: Normalized transaction and dashboard date filters to PostgreSQL-compatible date parameters while retaining DateOnly DTOs.

title: FT-P4-0004 Upgrade task tracker CLI API
description: Added command-style list/get/add/update/delete/upload/export/stats operations and upload mutation support with insert_type.

title: FT-P4-0005 Add task tracker skill
description: Documented the task tracker API workflow in task-tracker/SKILL.md for future agents.

title: FT-P4-0006 Update agent conventions
description: Updated AGENTS.md with SqlMapper runtime rules and the new pass-specific task CSV mutation schema.

title: FT-P4-0007 Import shared mapper DI pattern
description: Adapted the shared Program.cs/mapper-service pattern into AddFinanceOrmMapper, FinanceConnectionProvider, and FinanceOrmMapperService.

title: FT-P4-0008 Remove direct OrmMapper calls from finance data session
description: Routed FinanceSqlMapperDataSession through IOrmMapperService while keeping services behind IFinanceDataSession.

title: FT-P4-0009 Add local shared-style UI component library
description: Added finance-local Button, Input, Select, Checkbox, Table, StatusBadge, and EmptyState components based on the shared frontend component patterns.

title: FT-P4-0010 Refactor finance pages to component library
description: Updated dashboard, accounts, transactions, imports, subscriptions, reports, and settings pages to use shared-style tables/forms/buttons/badges/empty states.

title: FT-P4-0011 Align agent instructions with provided shared folder
description: Updated AGENTS.md to treat shared/ as the primary reference source and document current mapper/component conventions.
